title: Featured Groups
subtitle: Curate the groups shown first in discovery, with active groups filling any empty slots.
empty: No groups are curated yet. Discovery will use active groups as fallback.
eligibility_hint: Only visible groups with a description, banner, and recent activity can be featured.

placeholders.internal_note: Why this group is featured, campaign notes, or launch context.

delete_modal.title: Remove featured group
delete_modal.description: This removes the curated placement. The group itself will not be deleted.
